findings.finding_zh: 首頁動態文案可切換中英文，但部分操作提示、圖例、速度與資料來源說明屬於靜態首屏內容，英文模式仍可能保留中文或中英混合。
findings.finding_en: Most dynamic copy can switch language, but some first-view guidance blocks may remain Chinese or bilingual in English mode.
recommended_fix: Move static guidance blocks into the same language state as the existing language toggle.
Keep the map attribution visible in both languages.
Keep fallback list cards understandable before data loads.

next_run_must_check: Check the active project dataset and dedupe index before adding records.
Check that the first view still shows search, filters, stats, map frame, list, source hint and basic navigation quickly.
Check that the default basemap remains OpenStreetMap.
